'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=eiarE1Ly85NuyENww_mnintDHxRUpQhxARi6QvalR1I-1770511112-1.0.1.1-ZOshKVy2aXj3q9Mb6G5JrobHps.y38NBYj42Uu9IIfs"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
